name: Creole Onion Soup
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Maytag White Cheddar cheese; grated
2 cups French bread, cubed and lightly toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the olive oil and flour together. Stirring constantly for about 3-4 minutes until a blonde roux is formed.
2. Add the onions, salt, cayenne pepper, bay leaves, thyme, oregano, and basil. Stirring often, cook for about 10 minutes or until the onions are golden.
3. Add the garlic and continue cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Stir in the chicken broth. Reduce the heat and simmer for 1 hour.
5. Gradually add the cheeses (Maytag White Cheddar, Yellow Cheddar, and Parmigiano-Reggiano) while stirring to incorporate them into the soup.
6. In a mixing bowl, toss the bread with olive oil and Rustic Rub. Toast if necessary.
7. Ladle the hot soup into individual bowls and top each with the toasted bread cubes.
8. Garnish with grated cheese, chopped chives, and essence as desired.
